subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord of all created beings and God of all existences! I bear witness with my outer and inner tongue to Thy manifestation and appearance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا رب الکائنات و اله الموجودات اشهد بلسان ظاهری و باطنی بظهورک و بروزک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for assistance; intercession
